## HEADER

+21697118755
Ariana, Tunisia
hichem. salah1512@gmail. com

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Hichem Bensalah Final-year Data Science & AI Engineering Student, Tek-Up University
Final-year Data Science & AI Engineeringstudent(PFE Jan-Jun2026)focusedon ML/DL, ML Opsand AWS. Builtend-to-endpipelineswith DVC/M Lfow, Git Hub Actionsand Docker;delivereda CNN-Bi LST Mintrusiondetectionsystem(~99%accuracy)andproduction-ready deployments.

2023-2026

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

07/2025-09/2025
### AI & Data Science Intern, TUDIGISEC, TDS Global Technologies
**Date:** 07/2024-08/2024
**Location:** Tunis, Tunisia
- Delivereda Flask+Flask-Socketiowebdemowithtested/predict A Plandbasicreal-timeinterface.

11/2025
### Builtan Ls TM-basedsentimentanalysispipeline(Keras/Tensor Flow)on IM Dbmoviereviews, includingpreprocessing, trainingandevaluation.
